title: sour springy norwegian beef tomatoes tacos
description: a unique date-night dish featuring beef tomatoes and rest-meat. serve in a molcajete for a fun and interactive eating experience.

ingredients.name: ground beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 or 85/15 lean to fat ratio works best

instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, brown sugar, allspice, salt, and black pepper. mix well with your hands until just combined.
add the buttermilk to the beef mixture and mix until the beef is well coated.
cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat. remove the beef from the refrigerator and add it to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
cook the beef until it is browned, stirring occasionally. this should take about 5-7 minutes.
add the spring onions to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the beef tomatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
season the beef mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
warm the norwegian sour cream in a small saucepan over low heat.

to assemble the tacos, place a portion of the beef mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the sour cream, a sprinkle of chopped parsley, and a pinch of crushed red pepper. serve immediately in a molcajete.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
